Urea: High nitrogen fertilizer used for leafy growth and protein development
DAP: Diammonium phosphate fertilizer rich in phosphorus and nitrogen, ideal for root development
17-17-17: Balanced NPK fertilizer providing equal parts nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium
28-28-0: High nitrogen and phosphorus fertilizer for early plant growth and root establishment
14-35-14: Phosphorus-rich fertilizer for flowering and fruit development
10-26-26: Balanced fertilizer with emphasis on phosphorus and potassium for overall plant health
20-20-20: General purpose balanced NPK fertilizer suitable for most crops
MOP: Muriate of potash, potassium-rich fertilizer for fruit quality and disease resistance
